---
title: "Site Map"
---

## Navigation Structure

```text
Absent from Chronic
├── 🏠 Home
│   └── Index (NARRATIVE BRIDGE)
├── Project
│   └── Project Proposal (TECHNICAL BRIDGE)
├── Pipeline
│   ├── Pipeline Guide (TECHNICAL BRIDGE)
│   ├── CACHE Manifest (VERBATIM)
│   └── INPUT Manifest (VERBATIM)
├── Data Primer
│   ├── Variable Inclusion (VERBATIM)
│   └── Univariate Distributions (REDIRECT)
├── Analysis
│   ├── Outcome (LOP Day Decomposition) (REDIRECT)
│   ├── Outcome (Distribution Shapes) (REDIRECT)
│   ├── Exposure (Chronic Conditions) (REDIRECT)
│   ├── Predisposing (Socio-demographic) (REDIRECT)
│   ├── Facilitating (Health System & Behaviours) (REDIRECT)
│   ├── Needs (Perceived Health & Limitations) (REDIRECT)
│   └── Missingness (REDIRECT)
└── Site Map
    └── Site Map (NARRATIVE BRIDGE)
```

## Content Type

| Type | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| **VERBATIM** | Source file is transferred with no substantive content rewrite; only minimal wrapper/frontmatter edits when needed for rendering. |
| **REDIRECTED** | A transit `.qmd` page that meta-refreshes to a standalone rendered HTML analysis page. |
| **TECHNICAL BRIDGE** | Source content is preserved in meaning but technically transformed for web publishing (path cleanup, sanitization, bridge wrappers). |
| **NARRATIVE BRIDGE** | New authored page synthesized from contract inputs to orient navigation and evidence traceability. |

## Proposal Coverage

| Site Page | Project Proposal Section(s) | Current Coverage |
|-----------|-----------------------------|------------------|
| [Index](index.qmd) | §1 Background and Purpose; §6 Deliverables (site orientation context) | Covered: landing narrative anchors scope, audience, and evidence navigation. |
| [Project Proposal](project/project-proposal.qmd) | §1-§6 (full source document) | Covered: full proposal is published as the governing reference. |
| [Pipeline Guide](pipeline/pipeline-guide.qmd) | §3 Sample Construction; §4 Outcome Variable; §5 Analytic Plan; §6 Deliverables | Covered: implementation workflow and processing architecture documented. |
| [CACHE Manifest](pipeline/cache-manifest.qmd) | §3.2 Pooling; §4 Outcome construction checks; §6 reproducible artifacts | Covered: analytic dataset structure and outputs documented. |
| [INPUT Manifest](pipeline/input-manifest.qmd) | §2 Data Source; §3.2 pooling prerequisites | Covered: raw source provenance and input schema documented. |
| [Variable Inclusion](data-primer/variable-inclusion.qmd) | §2.2 Required Variables; §3.1 exclusions context | Covered: variable-by-variable traceability to implementation. |
| [Univariate Distributions](data-primer/univariate-distributions-redirect.qmd) | §4.2 Distribution Checks; §5.1 Missing Data profiling context | Covered via redirect to detailed univariate output. |
| [Outcome (LOP Day Decomposition)](analysis/outcome-redirect.qmd) | §4.1 Outcome Construction; §4.2 Distribution Checks | Covered via redirect to outcome decomposition analysis. |
| [Outcome (Distribution Shapes)](analysis/outcome-distribution-shapes-redirect.qmd) | §4.2 Distribution Checks; §5 model-family diagnostics context | Covered via redirect to distribution-shape analysis. |
| [Exposure (Chronic Conditions)](analysis/exposure-redirect.qmd) | §2.2 Primary Exposure; §5.3 Bivariate Analysis | Covered via redirect to exposure-domain report. |
| [Predisposing (Socio-demographic)](analysis/predisposing-redirect.qmd) | §2.2 Predisposing factors; §5.3 Bivariate Analysis | Covered via redirect to predisposing-domain report. |
| [Facilitating (Health System & Behaviours)](analysis/facilitating-redirect.qmd) | §2.2 Facilitating factors; §5.3 Bivariate Analysis | Covered via redirect to facilitating-domain report. |
| [Needs (Perceived Health & Limitations)](analysis/needs-redirect.qmd) | §2.2 Needs factors; §5.3 Bivariate Analysis | Covered via redirect to needs-domain report. |
| [Missingness](analysis/missingness-redirect.qmd) | §5.1 Handling Missing Data (MCAR/structure diagnostics) | Covered via redirect to missingness-specific analysis. |
| [Site Map](site-map.qmd) | Cross-cutting traceability to §1-§6 | Covered: explicit page-level mapping from site artifacts to proposal requirements. |
